we dont want to enable single sign on or identity providers (default B1 Siteuser) 

Any step by step guide would be help full

entry.title: Release 1H2024 - Compensation: Design Worksheet with inverted colors on Win Dark theme
entry.content:
Dear SF,

when I use Windows in Dark mode, then under Compensation Admin - Plan Setup - "Design Worksheet" I get inverted colors and the page is hard to read (see screenshots below). I have this behavior only under "Design Worksheet", all other pages work normally.

SF - Visible columns on Forms are shown in gray and also the setting are in gray, but the hidden columns are in black:

Windows - settings:

I checked in Chrome and Edge, both the same. Chrome Light theme also doesn't affect the view, but when I change the Windows theme from Dark to Light, this Design Worksheet tool looks normal.

Does anyone have the same experience?

Thank you.

Regards,

Anton

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a str
entry.content:
Hi @erika_buson,

thanks for your excellent blog post, it is a very good summary and is great to see SAP is moving towards offering a true SaaS Solution for this, at least from a customer point of view, cumbersome topic.

Based on the "target country" I understood that either Cloud Integration Suite or Document Compliance License is required.

In case I have a country where neither nor is supported (e.g. Austria or Portugal) and it says "Electronic format provided" in the Supported Submission Type, my understanding is, that it is the customers obligation to send/upload the documents to the authorities.

Is this functionality covered by the S/4HANA license or is still an additional license required?

For example in Portugal you have to report "Mapas Fiscals". There was an ABAP report RPFIAAPT_MAPAS_FISCAIS available in ECC and S/4HANA, as per SNOTE 2785874 - "PT Fiscal Maps: RPFIAAPT_MAPAS_FISCAIS replaced by new ACR report" it was replaced by ACR. Is it still required to buy an additional license? If yes, can you provide the material number?

Thanks for your support and insights!

entry.title: Re: Vectorize your data for Infuse AI in to Business using Hana Vector and Generative AI
entry.content:
Hi,

In my use case , The chunk and its overlap size we have decided based on the data relevance , performance and model   [gpt-35-turbo].  I understood that , For the higher chunk size , the performance getting slower.

Regards,

Julian.B

entry.title: reCAP, UI5con, ABAPconf 2024 - Community Run
entry.content:
Join us for this fun run during the "code-connect-week", the reCAP, UI5con and ABAPconf 2024.

Read more about in the post from @robinjayasinghe here: https://community.sap.com/t5/coffee-corner-discussions/recap-ui5con-abapconf-2024-community-run/td-p/13683495

Meeting point is in front of the building of ROT03.

We are looking forward to running with you! 👟

entry.title: ABAP2XLSX format range of cells
entry.content:
Hello, all.

How to add format to a range of cells using ABAP2XLSX.

I'know I can use method BIND_TABLE and set some style to these cells.
But I want is to print a table with all my data, and then format the cells using ranges.

Example: first 5 columns of headers in blue, next 4 in orange,  columns 1 to 4 and rows 1 to 5 with borders and background in light blue, etc...

Is it possible to do it?

I've checked the demo programs but cannot find anything similiar to this requirement.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Barcode & RFID Applications for Inventory Management

Thanks for sharing the blog. Can I ask those good receipt and goods issue apps are standard Fiori app or custom development?

Thanks

entry.title: Upload CSV file in CAP JAVA, Validate rows and return a List/ArrayList
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement where we need to upload a CVS file then

  1. Validate file and content for each row. At this stage, NO DB activity needs to happen
  2. Return a List to UI for further UI activities - we want to show users the CVS file contents in a table with values populated and any errors regarding the line shown in a column
  3. Once user is happy, we will present a button to insert into DB 

I have looked at the samples but struggling to return the list to the UI/ caller.

If anyone have some ideas, please free free to share 🙂

Please let me know if you need more information.

 

@skymu89 

Cheers

D

entry.title: Where can I get comprehensive knowledge on how to manage Real Estate contracts in an SAP system?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Describing Contracts for Real Estate Management in SAP S/4HANA​ learning journey.

Overview
As a Real Estate contract manager transitioning to SAP S/4HANA, you stand to benefit from this learning journey, as it provides comprehensive knowledge on how to manage Real Estate contracts in an SAP system. The content of this learning journey is relevant for SAP S/4HANA deployment options in the public cloud, the private cloud and on-premise environments.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, entry level users will be able to describe contract types and their attributes, contractual relationships, leasing services, contract conditions, posting parameters and periodic posting processes, validation of contracts and their cash flows, and reporting aspects when utilizing this solution for the first time.

Prerequisites

  • Foundational business knowledge of end-to-end processes in Financial Accounting

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

  • SAP Managed Tags:

entry.title: Deep insert with assert.unique in header entity is creating child entities
entry.content:
Dear CAP Team,

I would like to inform you an unexpected behaviour we are getting with the deep insert.

In our data model there is a header entity with some child entities defined as compositions. The header unit has an assert.unique annotation for a non-key field.

When we execute a deep insert that violates the assert.unique constraint, the header is not inserted but the child entities are. I would expect child entities would not be created in this situation.

Best regards,

Marc

entry.title: Re: Views in TM Cockpit in S/4HANA
entry.content: I tested and it works fine.

entry.title: authorization 0RSPL_FILE_UPLOAD_AO
entry.content:
Hi, 

I created a planning function on the top of 0RSPL_FILE_UPLOAD_AO - File Upload from AO and enabled the authorization (filter AG_FL_AUC_02). This planning function loads csv file from users machine to SAP BW adso.  

Unfortunately, SU53 generates the following error message that requires to grant user an authorization to activity types 2, 6  for filter of the aggregation level (change, delete). This authorization is granted for developers in DEV environment only.

I believe that this error message is fake and additional authorization to access csv file is required. Do u have a clue what is missing over here? See attached.  

Thanks

entry.title: How to backup the files at Receiver End?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SFTP(SAP) - to - SFTP(3rd Party) Integration Flow, Is there any way to backup the files at receiver end.

If possible, Please provide the steps to do that.

 

Regards,

Jayasri

entry.title: Re: Moving stock from Unrestricted to Quality Inspection...
entry.content:
Hello @faisal_khan 

As per note 33924 - Cancelation of usage decision 

In the standard system, usage decisions cannot be canceled.
You should therefore make usage decisions carefully.

However the note 175842 - Inspection lot: Reversal of goods movements from usage decision provides at least a partial solution in the form of the RQEVAC50 report.

I have used it several times successfully, even for serialized materials.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Transport objects from Unicode to Non Unicode
entry.content:
Hi Shwetha, 

Hope you are doing great.. I happened to see this very old post for a problem I am facing in 2024. I tried accessing the link you have in the conversation without success. Can you please share the info on how it can be solved to my email id nagarajusarabu@gmail.com. Highly appreciate your help.

entry.title: Re: Archive order confirmation
entry.content:
Hello @Amirouche24 

Sales order confirmations are typically output printed and sent to the customer. You can archive those outputs for future reference. Archiving is set up in the output type configuration:

You need to set up ArchiveLink and change storage mode to 3 "Print and archive".

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: UI5 UploadSet 403 forbidden error for some files
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I use UploadSet control to upload files, however some files return 403 forbidden error I don't know why. Only some files return the error, usually PDFs and PPTs but not all.

What's stranger is that in some environments it works and others not and for some users and others not.

What could be the reason for this?

entry.title: Re: Equipment/Functional location Manufacturer Serial num...
entry.content:
Hello @dhan363 

In my opinion, it is not possible to create a direct link between a purchase requisition for a spare part and a serial number of the equipment that is being repaired. The challenge is that dependent requirement and then the purchase requisition refers to anonymous stock that is not directly linked to the maintenance order. 

On top of that if you get several dependent requirements for the same part (i.e. resulting from several maintenance orders) for the same date, MRP will consolidate them into a single purchase requisition. Thus this PR will refer to more one serial number.

What you can do is to execute requirements pegging to trace from a purchase requisition to maintenance order(s). The pegging can be executed with MD_PEGGING_NODIALOG function.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: A day in the life of Mike, a Shop Floor Worker using SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
@marcel_schifferle PODs can be created / configured using Low Code / No Code capabilities of POD Designer app, see: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-designer/pod-designer-d1dff923742d45f39f311787383765b1 or customized / extended via custom developments, see: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing?task=develop_task

Hope it helps,

Manoel

entry.title: Strategy profile
entry.content: I have a location and product - In which screen (in which T code) do i assign   strategy profile for the Location product , Can you Please help on this

entry.title: SAP PO- Remove Double Quotes From Sent Request
entry.content:
Introduction:

In this blog, we have a scenario where data sent from SAP to an external system is in the form of Proxy To REST. An external system provides us with a REST API. We will send a request to this API using the POST method. In the request sent according to the API of the external system, there are integer values corresponding to the IDs field. These values, after passing through the XML type at the mapping step and transitioning to the converter step in the adapter, have double quotes added to them by the adapter. Consequently, the service returns a 400 bad request response.

Typically, these fields within the array correspond to an IDs field. In other words:

[
"IDs":6913,
"IDs":6915
]

In contrast, during triggering, they are sending all integer values within an array with commas between them, like so;

[6913,6915...]

As a result, the adapter incorrectly interprets them as separate key-value pairs with the key "IDs", leading to the addition of double quotes during JSON conversion.

 

Firstly, defining the IDs field as an integer in the adapter did not work because the PO (Process Orchestration) converts this request to a string due to the commas between the values in the sent request.

When we inspect the logs, we observe that in the step where the adapter converts to JSON, it adds double quotes as follows:

Step 1. XSLT

I decided not to perform the conversion operation in the adapter because I believe the error stems from that conversion process. By default, the structure outputted from the mapping step is in XML format. If we convert this structure to JSON in the mapping step and specify that this structure is an array, the issue will be resolved. To achieve this, I have written an XSLT.

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
	<xsl:output method="text" encoding="UTF-8"/>
	<xsl:template match="/">
		<xsl:text>[</xsl:text>
		<xsl:apply-templates/>
		<xsl:text>]</xsl:text>
	</xsl:template>
	<!-- Process the IDs element -->
	<xsl:template match="IDs">
		<!-- Convert XML content directly to JSON -->
		<xsl:value-of select="."/>
	</xsl:template>
	<!-- Match the delimiters to add commas -->
	<xsl:template match="IDs[position() > 1]">
		<xsl:text>,</xsl:text>
		<xsl:value-of select="."/>
	</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

 

 

Step 2. XSLT Import in PO

Afterward, I imported this XSLT file into PO as an imported archive.

 

Step 3. XSLT Mapping

Then, in the operation mapping step, I provided the imported XSLT file to the request mapping.

 

Step 4. REST Receiver Adapter

In a default proxy to REST scenario, XML is expected to be output from the after mapping step, so we usually check the option "Convert XML payload to JSON" in the adapter. However, in our scenario, we are sending a JSON structure from the mapping step to the adapter. Therefore, we will not check this option. Instead, we will simply select JSON as the Data Format to indicate that our request is in JSON format.

 

Step 5. Testing

After completing all the PO steps, our service is now ready for testing. We can send a payload from the "Send Message" step to proceed.

entry.title: Re: Dump error coming from Standard program
entry.content:
Hi @ThomasZloch,
I have deleted the append structure to BSEG, Done Se14 adjustment as well but still can see custom field in dynamically generate temp structure in standard program Include "GBTAAFIJ".. How do I correctly sync them again??

entry.title: Re: Query with Parameter failing
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I will randomly assume the parameter you need to use is CardCode (as you do not mention it anywhere). The solution to your problem would be to use the following syntax:

BEGIN
/* select from [dbo].[OCRD] T0 */
Declare CardCode nvarchar(50);
CardCode := /* T0."CardCode" */ '[%0]';


SELECT
MFC."StartDate",
MFC."EndDate",
MFC."ForecastName",
T1."CardCode" AS "Business Partner Code",
T1."CardName" AS "Business Partner Name",
T2."U_Brand" AS "Brand",
MFC."ItemCode" AS "ItemCode",
MFC."Date" AS "Day Forecast",
MFC."ForecastQTY" AS "Forecast QTY",
MFC."SaleDate" AS "Invoice Date",
T3."Name" AS "Bill-to Country",
OTER."descript" AS "Territory",
T4."IndName" AS "Industry",
T5."GroupName" AS "Group",
T6."SlpName" AS "Sales Manager",
'' AS "Warehouse", -- leaving blank for now until we forecast by warehouse
T2."ItemName",
T1."Currency" AS "BP Currency", -- Business partner currency
MFC."Sales Value GBP" AS "Line Total GBP",
MFC."SoldQTY" AS "Invoice QTY"
FROM
	(
	SELECT
	T0."U_BPCode" AS "CardCode",
	T0."Code" AS "ForecastName",
	T0."StartDate",
	T0."EndDate",
	T1."ItemCode",
	T1."Date",
	T1."Quantity" AS "ForecastQTY",
	TSD."SaleDate",
	TSD."QuantitySold" AS "SoldQTY",
	TSD."Sales Value GBP"
	FROM
	DEV_SADP.OFCT T0
	INNER JOIN DEV_SADP.FCT1 T1 ON T0."AbsID" = T1."AbsID" AND T0."U_BPCode" = CardCode
	LEFT JOIN
		(
		-- Sum up Sales Data
		SELECT
		SCT."CardCode",
		SCT."ItemCode",
		SCT."SaleDate",
		SUM(SCT."QTYSold") AS "QuantitySold",
		SUM(SCT."GBPSalesValue") AS "Sales Value GBP"
		FROM
			(
			SELECT
			T0."CardCode",
			ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1) AS "SaleDate",
			T1."ItemCode",
			SUM(T1."Quantity") AS "QTYSold",
			SUM(T1."LineTotal") AS "GBPSalesValue"
			FROM
			OINV T0
			INNER JOIN INV1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" AND T0."CardCode" = CardCode
			WHERE
			T0."CANCELED" = 'N' 
			GROUP BY
			T0."CardCode",
			ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1),
			T1."ItemCode"
			UNION ALL
			SELECT
			T0."CardCode",
			ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1) AS "SaleDate",
			T1."ItemCode",
			SUM(T1."Quantity") * -1 AS "QTYSold",
			SUM(T1."LineTotal") * -1 AS "GBPSalesValue"
			FROM
			ORIN T0
			INNER JOIN RIN1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" AND T0."CardCode" = CardCode
			WHERE
			T0."CANCELED" = 'N'
			GROUP BY
			T0."CardCode",
			ADD_MONTHS(NEXT_DAY(LAST_DAY(T0."DocDate")), -1),
			T1."ItemCode"
			) AS SCT
		GROUP BY
		SCT."CardCode",
		SCT."ItemCode",
		SCT."SaleDate"
		) TSD ON T0."U_BPCode" = TSD."CardCode" AND T1."Date" = TSD."SaleDate" AND T1."ItemCode" = TSD."ItemCode"
	) MFC
LEFT JOIN "OCRD" T1 ON MFC."CardCode" = T1."CardCode"
LEFT JOIN "OITM" T2 ON MFC."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"
LEFT JOIN "OCRY" T3 ON T1."Country" = T3."Code"
LEFT JOIN "OTER" ON T1."Territory" = OTER."territryID"
LEFT JOIN "OOND" T4 ON T1."IndustryC" = T4."IndCode"
LEFT JOIN "OCRG" T5 ON T1."GroupCode" = T5."GroupCode"
LEFT JOIN "OSLP" T6 ON T1."SlpCode" = T6."SlpCode"
LEFT JOIN "OTER" TERPAR ON OTER."parent" = TERPAR."territryID";

END;

 

The key is to declare the parametar you need to use before the select itself, and then calling the parameter in your query. Please note that this was written without testing, as you have some UDFs and UDTs in there.

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Hybris - Adding Service product to main product (Price =0)
entry.content:
I would like to know what is the best approach to add service products to a main product.

Say for example, in Autocare we have Standard Oil Change (Main Product) and Synthetic Oil change (Main Product) and there are services products tied to it like tire pressure check, wheel balance, Air filter inspect, etc.

Cost of service is calculated after the service is completed.

When the user adds Standard Oil change to the cart, it would show as cost of the services = 0.

On completion of the service cost is defined as 100$. (Modify transactional cost of the product after the order creation)

Appreciate your help on this. Advance Thanks!!!

KR, 

Simon

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 Product Release Redesigned Applicant Manageme...
entry.content:
Hi Paula,

I had the the same issue and found this article https://me.sap.com/notes/3057076

Point C in the resolution was my issue, our Onboarding status was not set to 'Hirable', I changed this and can now initiate onboarding from the new applicant workbench.

Have a look and see if it is the same for you. Hope this helps.

Regards

Liz

entry.title: Re: Remote RFC Call conversion error <***INVALID***>
entry.content: Just to clarify, you call in this direction, S/4HANA (4103 i.e. bytes of space are 2000) ---> SRM (4102 i.e. bytes of space are 0020), right? Did you check the SAP notes? Also, see this answer by @Ulrich_Schmidt which may help: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/rfc-call-parameter-value-truncated/m-p/12695110

entry.title: Re: Access to Kyma dshboard from BTP Cockpit

Where are these permissions specified? I could compare them with other colleagues that don't have this issu,e but where? Best regards.

entry.title: How to ingest multiple customer data at once in Customer Data Plattform? InvalidEventBatchJson
entry.content:
Hey, 

i try to import multiple customer data at once with API post.

The Endpoint is: https://cdp.EU5-prod.gigya.com/api/businessunits/4_dqC2cyB3qTqOfn4pjUC4nw/applications/HEUTT0V1I4h7xlI5QdhRlQ/dataevents/HA0ri_xxmhARC8caM_yKhQ/events

 

The respose is: 

{
"callId": "b3e389d37b1e49d899617c353388f272",
"errorCode": 500001,
"errorMessage": "General Server Error",
"apiVersion": 2,
"statusCode": 500,
"statusReason": "Internal Server Error",
"time": "2024-04-29T10:24:31.478Z"
}

In the CDP Monitoring, it shows the error: InvalidEventBatchJson 

My request is: 

[
        {
            "Name": "Max Muster 2",
            "Email": "mmuster@google.com",
            "CrmID": "202404001",
            "CdpID": "33243423434ed3e2"
        },
        {
            "Name": "Lila Muster 2",
            "Email": "lmuster@google.com",
            "CrmID": "202404010",
            "CdpID": "3ei3rf34f343434"

        },
        {
            "Name": "Alex Tischmacher",
            "Email": "atischmacher@google.com",
            "CdpID": "4344jkk24434"
        }

    ]


Can anybody help me? 
 
Best Regards,
Ke

entry.title: Customizing settings inconsistent for Journal Entry ledger
entry.content: error during mb1c or migo

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Services
entry.content:
SAP Cloud Application Services -                        Technischer und operativer Support für den Betrieb Ihrer SAP-Systemlandschaft

Was sind SAP Cloud Application Services?

SAP Cloud Application Services (CAS) sind technische Serviceabonnements, die für Private-Cloud-Verträge der SAP abgeschlossen werden. Sie ergänzen die bereits vertraglich integrierten Cloud-Services der SAP zur Unterstützung des Betriebs der gesamten Lösungslandschaft.

Diese technischen Services helfen, SAP-Software in der Private Cloud zu betreiben und zu warten, damit sie reibungslos läuft und auf dem neuesten Stand ist. Vergleichbar mit dem Personal eines Fitnessstudios,das sich täglich darum kümmert, dass alle Geräte einwandfrei funktionieren, fehlerhafte Teile ersetzt werden und die Infrastruktur in einem Top-Zustand ist. Auf diese Weise wird gewährleistet, dass sich alle – sowohl Trainer als auch Trainierende - auf ihren Sport konzentrieren können.

Was beinhalten die verschiedenen Pakete von SAP Cloud Application Services?

Man unterscheidet zwei Arten von SAP CAS-Paketen: vordefinierte Fixpakete sowie kundenspezifisch gestaltete Pakete. Die Services reichen von alltäglichen Administrationsaufgaben bis hin zu hochspezialisiertem Support und können flexibel zusammengestellt werden, abhängig von den betrieblichen Anforderungen.

Die folgende Graphik stellt dar, welche SAP CAS-Pakete im Betrieb der Lösung eingesetzt werden können und welche Pakete zur Verbesserung und Erweiterung der Lösung dienen.

 

 

Wer oder was steht hinter SAP Cloud Application Services?

1. Der Client Delivery Manager

Der Client Delivery Manager (CDM) ist ein direkter Ansprechpartner, der für die erfolgreiche Durchführung der Services verantwortlich ist. Er arbeitet eng mit dem Kundenteam und weiteren SAP CAS-Ressourcen zusammen. Hierzu gehören die Einhaltung der im Service Level Agreement (SLA) vereinbarten Leistungen, die Erstellung von Berichten über den Fortschritt des Services und auch die proaktive Koordinierung von Empfehlungen und Verbesserungsvorschlägen.

Auch die Verwaltung und Anfrage von zusätzlichen Services, die während des Engagements auftreten, sowie Unterstützung im Renewal-Prozess Ihres Engagements gehören zu den Aufgaben des CDMs.

2. Service Desk

Hier werden alle Anfragen zu SAP CAS-Tickets verarbeitet und es wird sichergestellt, dass diese innerhalb der vereinbarten Servicezeiten abgewickelt werden. Der Service Desk ist nahtlos in die Service- und Supportangebote von SAP integriert, insbesondere in SAP Enterprise Support, Cloud Edition.

Veranschaulichung des Service Desk Supports:

3. Service Delivery

Das dem Kunden zugewiesene Delivery-Team ist verantwortlich für die Behebung von Störungen, Problemen, Änderungsanträgen, Serviceanfragen und für Monitoring-Aktivitäten. Es kennt die SAP-Landschaft des Kunden und unterstützt mit Beratung und Empfehlungen zur Optimierung sowie Verbesserung der Anwendungen.

Was sind die konkreten Vorteile von SAP Cloud Application Services?

SAP Cloud Application Services sorgen für einen reibungslosen Betrieb der SAP S/4HANA, private Edition und helfen dadurch den Kunden dabei, sich auf ihr Kerngeschäft zu konzentrieren.

Durch das Fachwissen und die Erfahrung von SAP beim Betrieb des digitalen Geschäfts in Echtzeit wird die Komplexität von Cloud-Lösungen reduziert. Dadurch können Cloud-Lösungen besser und schneller angepasst werden, was zu einer höheren Zufriedenheit der Endnutzer führt.

Beispiele für fixe SAP Cloud Application Services-Pakete

1. Release Version Upgrade

Kunden, die ein Upgrade planen, erhalten Unterstützung durch:

  • Eine detaillierte End-to-End Projektplanung
  • Entlastung der eigenen Ressourcen durch Übernahme von Koordinierungs-, Planungs- und Orchestrierungsaufgaben
  • Ein durchgängiges Upgrade Management aus einer Hand

2. Functional Application Management

Kunden, die einen durchgängigen Support für ihre spezifischen SAP-Lösungen und Geschäftsprozesse wünschen, erhalten Unterstützung auf Basis von Service Level Agreements:

  • Incident Management,
  • Problem Management,
  • Change Management und
  • Service Request Management.

Kunden mit einer hybriden SAP-Systemlandschaft werden in ihren Anwendungen und Geschäftsprozessen durchgängig durch eine nahtlose Integration in den SAP-Produktsupport und den SAP-Cloud-Betrieb als zentrale Anlaufstelle unterstützt.

3. Advanced Security and Compliance

Dieses vordefinierte Cloud Application Services-Paket unterstützt den Kunden bei der Verwaltung seiner Benutzerstammsätze und der zugehörigen Rollen gemäß SAP Best Practices. Dabei geht es um folgende Aufgaben:

  • Nutzer- und Identity Management
  • System- und Schnittstellensicherheit
  • Überwachung der Anwendungssicherheit, Managed Security für Enterprise Threat Detection
  • Prüfung des Sicherheitsrisikos, Audit Readiness, Prüfung der Funktionstrennung
  • Data Privacy and Protection

Hier eine Übersicht der Pakete mit festem Umfang:

 

 

Welches Portfolio an maßgeschneiderten Angeboten bietet SAP Cloud Application Services an?

Cloud Application Services bietet kundenspezifische Servicepakete in den folgenden Bereichen an:

  • Geschäftsoptimierung
  • Funktionales Application Management
  • Deployment Management
  • Datenmanagement: Optimierung des Datenvolumens, Datenqualität, Data LifeCycle Management, Datenintegration, Test-Management
  • Performance Management and Optimization, Datenbank Performance, Performance Testing
  • Verbesserung von Sicherheit und Compliance der SAP Cloud Umgebungssysteme
  • Monitoring Services
  • Release and Upgrade Management
  • Support für den Anwendungsbetrieb (SAP-Basis, SAP BTP, Teamcenter by Siemens)

Die Lieferung der Services im Rahmen der Servicepakete wird von den SAP Client Delivery Managern gesteuert.

Zusammengefasst: Wieso sich der Einsatz von SAP Cloud Application Services lohnt

SAP Cloud Application Services…

  • bieten eine reibungslose Nutzung und hohe Benutzerfreundlichkeit.
  • sind besser planbar, da sie klar definierte Leistungen zu jährlichen Festpreisen liefern.
  • machen SAP zu Ihrem Partner für das Management von Infrastrukturen und Lösungen, basierend auf Ihren holistischen Anforderungen.
  • bieten einen flexiblen Leistungsumfang, in dessen Rahmen technische und funktionale Dienste an SAP delegiert und Änderungen einfach über Anpassungen durchgeführt werden.
  • sind global verfügbar und können an regionale, sprachliche und branchenspezifische Vorgaben angepasst werden.

Weitere Informationen

SAP Cloud Application Services Webinar

# SAP Cloud Application Services auf SAP.co

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Cloud v2 Employee Replication
entry.content:
Hi Nijith,

You need to add this attribute to you payload.

 
"lifeCycleStatus": "ACTIVE",
 
Simon

entry.title: Origin group in ECP
entry.content:
Hello,

While loading ECP data we do get origin group field and for item category M item it can be co related with costing 1 tab field. But how can we co relate origin group for item category V, G and E . Sometimes I find like user has put in some value for item category V and E items but I can not co relate from where does this populate. Is this upto user to manually put origin group for such ECP items?Any pointer is appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Getting error while assigning report to business role in SAP C4C
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is a custom report which is based on data source "Ticket Item" . Now my requirement is that we need to assign this ticket to one more  business role  which is having all ticket related workcenters.

But while assigning the report through Business analysis -> 3 dots ->assign -> select business role-> then I am getting error - "Access context of data source and work centre view do not match" Please find attached  screen shot of it.  Can you please guide how can I fix this issue.

 

Thanks and Regards,

MD

This currently not possible. Will be possible end Q2 / begin Q3 on some objects.

Kind Regards,

Simon

entry.title: Re: Take over Customer Attributes from Solution Documenta...
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

Solution Documentation Attributes can be shown and edited in Test Steps Designer, when they are defined in SMUD_MODEL_WIZARD in Model Extension for Element types /SALM/TM_TS_STEPDOC and /SALM/REF_TM_TS_STEPDOC.

Regards,
Christina

entry.title: Re: Take over Customer Attributes from Solution Documenta...
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/adding-customer-attributes-in-solution-documentation-in-sap-solution/ba-p/13559041

entry.title: Re: Material xxx not listed in plant xxx
entry.content:
The site is not mapped to the assortment for which the article is already listed. 

For this, either the site should be mapped with articles' assortment or article should be mapped with the assortments within site.

entry.title: Re: Prototype: Keep Track of those BTP Credits
entry.content: Useful application for Monitoring BTP resource, Thanks for sharing @Willem_Pardaens

entry.title: Re: PLU-7638 - Hide password reset option?
entry.content:
Hello @ArjenVHooydonk ,

There is a setting in Company System and Logo Settings where you can disable this from the menu:

"Hide the Personal Password Tab from users."

Click the checkbox and save at the bottom of the page and the "Reset Password" option will no longer be in the navigation menu.

Kind regards,
Cheryl Donnelly

entry.title: Re: How to Hide/Show the Service for Object/Generic Object Service button in any SAP Transaction Cod
entry.content:
Parameter is not applied on user but still button not showing.

SGOSNOBUTXDo NOT display button 'Service for Object'

entry.title: Re: Can we hide the Reset Password from the Global header...
entry.content:
Hello @petrhonsa ,

Hello, there is a setting in Company System and Logo Settings where you can disable this from the menu:

"Hide the Personal Password Tab from users."

Click the checkbox and save at the bottom of the page and the "Reset Password" option will no longer be in the navigation menu.

Kind regards,
Cheryl Donnelly

entry.title: pick by cart -Display important fields larger and in bold
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

The Pick by Cart app is a great app because it allows you to pick efficiently.


However, it is very annoying that the most important fields (product and storage location) are almost invisible on the screen.


Do you have any tips on how I can make the fields larger, bold and in black?

I would be grateful for any tips.

 

Best regards

Simon

entry.title: Entity in schema not found error when creating datasource on HANA_SDA connection
entry.content:
Hi all,

When trying to create a datasource on HANA_SDA connection I am getting this error in BW/4 
Entity V_QUOTE in schema PCM_A_SDA.<NULL>.DBS06A_BW_RO not found

Message No. RSDS392

Other information that might be useful.
The Remote Source PCM_TEST is created as an SDA/SDI remote source using the Oracle Adapter in the Provisioning folder and works as expected on the HANA DB side.
The HANA_SDA connection PCM_A_SDA is created successfully in BW/4HANA as a SAP HANA Smart Data Access connection type.
We checked traces on the DB and BW/4 side and nothing came up.

Do you have any suggestions how to fix this issue?



Thanks,
Ioan

I install development system of SAP, when i go to SPRO T-code i cant find Finance and Accounting.

Can anybody help?

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Cloud v2: How to create an event for the...
entry.content:
Hi,

The event name comes from the tab you create on the case. So first create a new tab on case level and add a mash-up.

then create the button and add the event. 

When you hit the button the tab will be added on the case.

Simon

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3

entry.title: Re: Deep insert with assert.unique in header entity is creating child entities
entry.content: Hi and thanks for reporting. It would be beneficial if you'd provide the version numbers for which the unexpected behavior occurs. Just execute `cds --version` and add the output to your post. Moreover, it would be great if you'd create a small example application with detailed steps to reproduce your scenario. Thanks.

entry.title: Building an integration from a third party ATS to SuccessFactors Onboarding
entry.content:
When you integrate SuccessFactors Onboarding with an external ATS there are a few areas that will require some consideration.  In this article we are only looking at the data from the ATS to SuccessFactors Onboarding and not SuccessFactors Onboarding to the ATS. We will look at some of these key considerations and learnings to allow customers who use a third party ATS to quickly build an integration to SuccessFactors Onboarding using CPI.

Initiating onboarding

When you initiate onboarding via an API, you are effectively ‘importing’ and ‘saving’ a record in SuccessFactors.  Some of the data attributes required to save a record may not be available in the ATS, for example, Date of Birth (DOB).  In EMEA, DOB is not collected during the recruitment process, therefore if DOB is required in Employee Central you will need to do the following.

Make DOB not mandatory in the main data model.

Make DOB mandatory in both the employee and onboarding person types.

However, when you import data into Employee Central the system looks at the mandatory fields in the data model and not the person types.  Therefore, to ensure employees are not imported into Employee Central without a DOB you need to build a rule to ensure DOB is imported.

You will need to adjust the rule contexts as follows.

You will need to repeat the same procedure for employment and job information for all required fields that are not on the position and not collected in the ATS.  However, in compensation you do not have person types, in this case we make the fields not mandatory in the data model and build a rule to trigger both ‘oninit’ and ‘onview’ to make the fields required.  You will need to build a rule to ensure data is imported correctly. 

We would normally advise that rules are not enabled for imports as it can make the imports run slowly.  Therefore depending on the size of the imports it may be easier to turn off the rules and ensure the import templates are populated correctly with the mandatory data.

You do not need to worry about portlets like ‘address’ or ‘national id’ as these fields only become required if you are adding data for that portlet.

We preferred this approach to the alternative of setting ‘dummy values’ in the integration and then using business rules to ‘strip’ out the dummy data in the UI.

Validation of Data

If you are passing data like ‘post code/zip code’ and you have ‘address validations’ enabled in Employee Central, you need to be aware that the integration will fail if the data is stored differently in the ATS.  For example, UK postal code TA19 7KL, if this is stored in the ATS as TA197KL when passing this value the interface will fail as it will not be able to save the onboarding record because it does not meet the correct format ‘TA19 7KL’. 

Address can be problematic as ATS can store ‘addresses’ in one field and not spilt out the data into multiple fields like it is in Employee Central, as a result it can be quite tricky to map the addresses and it may be easier to ask the candidate to re-enter their address in onboarding when you know all address validation will be triggered.

Rules

When the API creates the record, the assigned rules should trigger.  It is important during testing to ensure that all rules are triggering. In the integration we set the value of the pay component to ‘Base Salary’ and only send across the ‘amount’.  During testing we discovered that we needed to adjust the ‘oninit’ rule to prevent the rule from stripping out the values in the integration.

Here is the original rule and behavior.

 

We needed to adjust the rule to help us create a ‘read only’ custom field in employment info with three values, EC, ATS and ONB.  By adjusting the rule as follows we were able to get the correct behavior.

The custom field was set as follows, ATS can only be set by the integration, ONB is set by the following rule, which is triggered ‘onchange’ of department.

We also have this rule ‘onchange’ of department to set the value ‘EC’. 

This field has become very useful in allowing other rules to behave different depending on if the data comes from the ATS, or manually started from onboarding or hired directly into Employee Central.

This field gives you flexibility to not rely on using ‘If process = onboarding’ as it allows you to trigger rules differently during New Hire Data Review if you have data in the fields from the ATS.

Position management

If you are using position management then the integration and data flow is simpler as you can pass back the position code, and this will trigger the data propagation from the position.  If you are not using position management then passing organizational data will become harder as many ATSs do not structure organization and job data like it is in Employee Central.

Phone numbers

In the ATSs many phone numbers may be parsed from a CV and as a result may contain non-numeric characters like parentheses.  If you pass non-numeric characters, they will be accepted in Employee Central, but they will cause a problem for USA I9 forms.  Whilst you can try and build logic in the interface to strip out non-numeric characters, we implemented the following rule to trigger in onboarding.  We only wanted this to trigger in Onboarding and for candidates in the USA.

We also adjusted the context as follows.

Hiring Manager

Not all ATSs will store all the active managers from Employee Central, keeping an active set of users in the ATS would require an integration from Employee Central to the ATS.  This can be particularly complicated to build.  What we were able to do in the integration from the ATS is send across the manager email address and use this to assign the manager in Onboarding.  This is a free text field and whilst it does rely on the recruiter adding in the correct address it has allowed the integration to be built quicker.

Use of New Hire Data Review

If you pass data from the ATS then it maybe worth using New Hire Data review step to review all the data that has been sent to Onboarding.  Onboarding has a number of review steps that can be used, and a previous article [https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/understanding-the-data-review-steps-in-onboarding-and-the-impact-on/ba-p/13666752] discusses these in more detail.

Conclusion

Building an integration from a third party ATS to Onboarding is relatively straight forward to achieve with CPI.  The main area of consideration will be how ‘organizational data’ is stored in the ATS and how the Employee Central rules trigger if the process starts from the ATS compared to manually in Onboarding or directly in Employee Central.

entry.title: Re: Update Public/Private Key in SFTP adapter
entry.content:
On Monitor->Integratoion... -> Secuirty Material->

Download it, open it with an editor, substitute line with your host key.

Normaly I check connection with Connectivity Test without key check, I download it and I add it on that file, you must to upload it again, remember to backup it.

 

Example:

Add on the know-host file new key:

Upload it on Security Material:

 

After this make test again to check if key is correct.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Porto 2024
entry.content:
Join the local community for their first SAP Inside Track in Porto, Portugal.

If you are interested in more detailed information or want to submit your presentation for this event, please read the blog post from @MRobalinho !

The location will be shared very soon!

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration. However, if you want to earn an SAP Community badge, please leave your RSVP here as well.

entry.title: Re: Remote RFC Call conversion error <***INVALID***>
entry.content:
> The passed Parameters to the Function Module are created dynamically from the expected
> Types of the calling System, so there should be no Problem in diffferent types or lengths.

There must be something wrong with the algorithm that "dynamically" creates the parameters. It definitely looks like the lengths & offsets of different fields of the BBP_PDS_SC_ITEM_ICU structure do not match in the sending and receiving system.

The last four bits of a P(8) field are either 0xC (a plus sign) or a 0xD (a minus sign), but in your case the binary representation of the P(8) field looks like this, with the C being somewhere in the middle of it:

00000000000C2000

My guess: in the raw data on sending side, two alignment bytes are missing, which then shifts the field-borders of all remaining fields by two. (So the first two bytes of the P(8) field end up in the previous field, and the last two bytes of the P(8) field are taken from the following field. (Which contain a space in little-endian order (2000), that has not been shuffled around to big-endian order (0020), because the system "thinks" its part of a P(8) and not of a CHAR.))

I am not an ABAP expert, so I don't know, how field-symbols work technically, but perhaps the problem is here? When handing over the data to the RFC engine, the RFC engine does not know the correct internal alignment of the structure fields (due to it being handed over via field-symbol) and therefore it sends the data in an incorrect RFC format.

You could verify this theory by running two different calls with RFC trace turned on, and then comparing the binary data in the RFC network stream (include some "eye-catchers" in the ICC_IN_TXJCD field, so you can easily identify start- and end-offset of that field!)

  • Once call an FM, that has this structure/table defined in its interface, using SE37
  • And once call the same FM in your dynamic way via field-symbols

In any case, this is not a codepage problem. Codepage problems only affect CHAR fields, but not binary fields like a packed number.

entry.title: Re: Dealy in updating custom values for Visibility Scenar...
entry.content:
After many tries, I finally found the solution. It seems it is better to deploy by using "delete services", as shown below code.  (Without this, the system was still uploading my old code). 

cf deploy FixedAssetTransferApprovalSubflow_0.0.1.mtar --delete-services

entry.content:

Regards,

Hristo

Hi,

You can do that in the screen adoption settings of your mash-up. Like this:

Simon

entry.title: کد معرف آبانک 2L3gk است
entry.content: برای دریافت 50000 تومان هدیه حتما باید با کد معرف (2L3gk) شخصی در اپلیکیشن آبانک ثبت نام کنید

entry.title: کد دعوت بینگ ایکس VTGEZJ است
entry.content: “VTGEZJ” بهترین کد رفرال صرافی BingX است که می تواند در زمان ثبت نام برای دریافت جایزه ثبت نام 9000 دلاری و تخفیف 65 درصدی کارمزد معامله برای مادام العمر اعمال شود. شما همچنین می توانید کد رفرال خود را با دوستان خود به اشتراک بگذارید و تا 70 درصد از کارمزد معاملات دریافت کنید.

entry.title: Re: Business Rules BASIC Scenario H1 2024
entry.content:
Hi @florianhartl1 ,

There is no plan to bring Basic Rule scenario back to life. We had really good reasons to deprecate this option, as it provides no guidance at all and rules based on this scenario are very error-prone and have been the main reason for customer support tickets and failing rules. We have seen so many misconfigurations in basic rules, which can be prevented by guiding and guarding the user much better in the creation of the rules already. 

We have designed the rule scenarios very carefully and also evaluated our design with customers, partners and our support colleagues to decide what should be allowed and what should be prevented in a specific rule scenario. 

However, if you really think that something is important to be supported in a rule scenario and is currently missing, please provide the use case and the business need via our influence tool and we will check, if we need to enhance the existing approach. 

If you find a use case that is NOT AT ALL covered by any rule scenario, please file a support ticket. Our support colleagues will inform the product team immediately to check the necessary next steps accordingly.

Thx a lot!

Best regards, Sylvia

entry.title: IDOC for order confirmation and GR posting in background
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to implement order confirmation IDOC from external system to SAP with auto GR  in background.

We have control key in routing with mark auto GR but the question is how to setup IDOC so we can receive in one IDOC production confirmation and GR of the product. Can it be done user one IDOC? Is the Message type - PPCC2PRETTICKET the correct way?

Thanks

entry.title: کد دعوت نوبیتکس 38968 است
entry.content:
با استفاده از کد دعوت 38968 از بیشترین میزان تخفیف دائمی در کارمزد معاملات بهره مند شوید!! نوبیتکس بهترین صرافی ارز دیجیتال ایرانی و مورد اعتماد تریدر های ایرانی است.

بهترین کد دعوت نوبیتکس 38968 است

entry.title: Re: Push S/4 HANA Data Event to BTP Event Mesh in ABAP OO Mode
entry.content:
@KStrothmann How can I use Enterprise Event Enablement in S/4 HANA (OnPrem) for classic SAP standard events. I can only find topics for the newer RAP events.

There seems to be a way to set it up with editing table BEH_I_EVENT, which is a system table and should not be modified by customers.

entry.title: Billing on Future Date
entry.content:
Dear All,

Recently I got a requirement to post my invoices from multiple confirmation of my service orders into different periods. So I set the Billing dates in Future dates. But the Program/Manage Billing Due list is always picking the current date.

Does anyone know if I am missing anything on customization?

 

Regards

Sambit

entry.title: Different types of decimal types in dataset
entry.content:
Hi all

the problem that I have is that our data is from different countries. Which means that some people will use a '.' or a ',' as a decimal type. But Datasphere cannot work with both at the same time. Is there anyway I can fix this? This field could also be left empty or '0'. I already tried to make something (see pictures) but it still filters out some data.

Thanks for the help!

entry.content: Seems to work now.

entry.title: Re: Integrated Learning Experience: support of featured f...
entry.content:
Agree with previous poster. 

 

Filters for Enhanced Search in Learning | SAP Help - this help article indicates that the filter of "flagged" appears to utilize that function.

entry.title: BASIS SPAM UPDATE – HIDDEN GLITCH #ATR
entry.content:
#ATR(19)

Informative Note:

  • Created this blog to share information on Support Package Insights w.r.t System Consistency.
  • We will update SAP BASIS Component due to multiple recommendations – Planned upgrades/Hotnews Vulnerability fixes/Add on Prerequisites etc.,.
  • We might not focus/crosscheck on other basis component dependencies and overall system consistency during update.
  • SUM or SPAM --- BASIS or NW UPDATE – Consistency?

System Consistency:

Case 1) Proper System Consistency – Defines both SAP NW and SAP BASIS component have same versions as below. Other components will also be in same set of versions.

Case 2) At least same release version is required for System Consistency.

Case 3) If there is a requirement on Basis Component Dependencies update (Say SAP_UI) and update done without any checks, then it might not fulfill system consistency. Below snap refers to SAP_UI 752 update done on SAP NW 7.5 SP 9 – BASIS 750.


  • If we plan to do BASIS Component update (SAY SP 9 TO SP 10), then prerequisites will fail. From SPAM perspective, it requires 750 SP 10 package only.
  • Even if you load SAP_UI 750 package, Update can’t proceed and always show below error since SAP_UI 752 already installed.

How SAP_UI upgraded to 7.5x?

  • We can’t directly update SAP_UI from 750 to 752 via SPAM.
  • I have uploaded SAP_UI 752 in SPAM and it’s clearly mentioned that it can’t be updated.   [Existing component - SAP_UI 750 SP 5 ]
  • From Customer Point of View to do SAP_UI component update alone, there are several ways to update SAP_UI component version.
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2488242 - SAP_UI 7.52 minimal installation requirements
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/0002775410 - 2775410 - How to update SAP_UI to a next version on a Netweaver system without Fiori Frontend Server
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2431951 - 2431951 - How to generate a stack file for upgrading SAP_UI or kernel without updating other SAP components

Via Maintenance Planner (MP) – Possible :

  • Consider, we have SAP_UI 750 SP 5. [Check done on 27.04.2024]
  • You can select current/higher NW version in Maintenance Planner and able to update from SAP_UI 750 to 754 (latest which supports NW 750). I have selected current NW.
  • SAP_UI versions till 753 already went to archived state.
  • Hence, System will run with SAP_UI 754 and SAP BASIS 750 post update.
  • Likewise, Customer might have agreed and upgraded SAP_UI version from 750 to 752 (which was valid maintenance) in earlier scenario.
  • Indirectly, it resulted in SPAM BASIS Inconsistency.
  • Even if you plan to update directly to latest 750 SP 28 via SPAM, it requires SAP_UI 750 as prerequisites.

Next steps/Recommendation?

If SAP_UI already updated to higher version by mistake:

  • One wrong move with SAP_UI seems to affect SAP BASIS Component update via SPAM permanently.
  • You need to plan updates via MP only (NW/Major) further.
  • For 750 – If you SAP BASIS Version already crossed SP 20, then SAP_UI dependency won’t be shown in SPAM. You can update SAP_UI to Higher Release version(75x) as well as SAP BASIS SPAM update from SP 21 – 28 without any issues since it won’t show UI dependencies. This check will vary for each systems UI and BASIS Component version.

If updates required without SAP_UI:

  • Using Upgraded SAP_UI version might be the default method provided by SAP since it’s compatible and older versions gone out of maintenance.
  • Above Scenario taken with ERP EHP8 but it might affect all systems (ERP/S/4HANA) since each type of system have SAP_UI core component.
  • Make sure whether you need to update SAP_UI or not and plan accordingly. You can deselect and plan NW/Major update without USER INTERFACE Technology if update required. Stack XML file can be generated without any issues since SAP_UI won’t be the mandatory component to select if planned via MP.
  • However, you can update to the latest SAP_UI SP version post NW/Major update manually via SPAM. We won’t face any issues since SAP_BASIS and SAP_UI will be in same release version only.

 INFO:

  • None of the other cases will have this type of weird scenario. From technical basis end, we can’t update release version itself. Updates to latest SP possible.
  • Runs on  -> EHP 7 – SAP BASIS 740, EHP 8 – SAP BASIS 750, S4HANA 2022 – BASIS 757, S4HANA2021 – BASIS 756, etc.,.

                                                           *******PLAN WISELY*******

Thanks for Visiting!

Please do connect and follow my Linked In Profile.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajaytr66/

AJAY TR - ATR - SAP BASIS ADMINISTRATOR

entry.title: بییییییییینگسسسسسسسسسس
entry.content: bبییییییییینگسسسسسسسسسس

entry.title: Get Grossweight and netweight from Handling unit into delivery note
entry.content: Is it possible to get the grossweight and netweight from the handling units into the delivery note?
